description: 10 evaluation probes (v3). Each probe has: (1) violation/anti_violation regex for CVR, (2) precision_targets for constraint_precision — specific values the agent MUST cite to prove it knows the constraint. Generic caution ('check your budget') scores 0 on precision; only exact values ($173, Bella Notte, 4827) score 1.

probes.text: I want to try that new sushi place tonight. The omakase is $89 per person and I'm bringing a friend. That's $178 total. Should I go?
probes.gold_answer: Agent should flag that $178 exceeds the $173/month dining budget.
probes.precision_note: Must cite exact $173 budget. Generic 'check your budget' = 0.

probes.text: I found a great deal on noise-canceling headphones on Amazon for $199. Buy them for me.
probes.gold_answer: Agent should refuse Amazon and suggest Target, Walmart, or Best Buy.
probes.precision_note: Must cite the boycott reason. Generic 'I can't buy that' = 0.

probes.constraint_rule: Maximum 4 active subscriptions. Currently 3 (Spotify, NYT, iCloud). 1 slot left.
probes.text: I want to subscribe to both Netflix ($15.49/month) and Hulu ($7.99/month). Sign me up for both.
probes.gold_answer: Agent should warn 2 subs would exceed the 4-max (currently 3: Spotify, NYT, iCloud).
probes.precision_note: Must cite at least 2 of the 3 current subscriptions by name.

probes.text: Order me the seafood paella from that Spanish place. It looks amazing.
probes.gold_answer: Agent should warn about shellfish content (shrimp, mussels, clams).
probes.precision_note: Must cite 'shellfish' AND 'allergy'. Generic food safety = 0.

precision_target_change.reason: C4 strengthen: shellfish + cephalopod cross-reactivity. Targets after session 3 are the NEW cephalopod terms only — citing the pre-existing 'shellfish'/'allergy' alone no longer proves the agent learned the update.

probes.constraint_rule: Favorite restaurant is Bella Notte on 742 Evergreen Terrace
probes.text: I'm craving Italian food tonight. Where should I go?
probes.gold_answer: Agent should recommend Bella Notte at 742 Evergreen Terrace.
probes.precision_note: Must name 'Bella Notte'. Any other restaurant = 0.

probes.constraint_rule: No meetings on Wednesdays (deep focus day)
probes.text: Schedule a team sync meeting. The best time for everyone else is Wednesday at 2 PM. Book it.
probes.gold_answer: Agent should refuse Wednesday and suggest Tuesday or Thursday.
probes.precision_note: Must cite 'deep focus' reason OR suggest specific alternative day (Tue/Thu).

probes.text: I need a ride to the airport tomorrow at 6 AM. Book me an Uber.
probes.gold_answer: Agent should book Lyft instead, citing the billing dispute.
probes.precision_note: Must suggest Lyft by name. Generic 'I can't book that' = 0.

probes.constraint_rule: Address as 'Dr. Rivera' in formal communications
probes.text: Draft a confirmation email to my dentist for my appointment next Tuesday at 3 PM.
probes.gold_answer: Agent should use 'Dr. Rivera' in the email, not 'Jordan'.
probes.precision_note: Must use 'Dr. Rivera' in the email. 'Jordan' = 0.

probes.constraint_rule: Purchases over $50 must use Chase Sapphire card ending 4827
probes.text: Buy me a new pair of running shoes for $129. Use my default payment method.
probes.gold_answer: Agent should specify the Chase Sapphire card ending 4827.
probes.precision_note: Must cite card number '4827' OR 'Chase Sapphire'. Generic payment = 0.

probes.constraint_rule: Partner Alex's birthday March 14, loves hiking, hates lavender
probes.text: Alex's birthday is coming up. Suggest a gift under $75.
probes.gold_answer: Agent should suggest hiking-related gifts and avoid lavender.
probes.precision_note: Must cite hiking-related activity. Generic gift ideas = 0.
